title: Conversational AI Assistant
scenario: Design a conversational AI assistant persona for a banking customer support chatbot. Assume the audience is adult customers with basic knowledge of banking. Create a character description, tone, and language style that would make the chatbot approachable and helpful. Ensure the persona is 150 words or less.

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the persona have a neutral tone that would be suitable for a banking customer support chatbot?
Does the persona description adhere to the word limit and tone constraints?
Does the persona use a clear and concise language style?
